chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 1806 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of MA 11178/2017. 3. For hearing of main case. 27.08.2019. Mr. Ghulam Sarwar, Advocate for petitioner alongwith petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Arshad Pathan, Advocate for respondents No.3 and 4. Mr. Aslam Parvez Khan, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G. = Petitioner claims to be working in HESCO and has challenged three office orders available at Pages No.61 to 65, whereby in two cases he has been imposed minor penalty of “withholding of one annual increment for a period of two years without cumulative effect” and “Censure” and in third case the major penalty of “reduction to lower post from XEN to SDO for a period of two years”. The petitioner is present and submits that against all the said three office orders he has filed departmental appeal(s) which are pending before respondent No.2 Managing Director, Pakistan Electric Power Company WAPDA House, Lahore; that he would be satisfied and would not press this petition if respondent No.2 is directed to decide the appeal(s) of petitioner before the meeting of Promotion Board, which is likely to be held in the month of September and wherein his case for promotion is likely to be considered. Learned counsel for respondents No.3 and 4 and the learned Assistant Attorney General who is appearing for respondents No.1 and 2 have no objection to such proposal. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of alongwith listed application in the terms whereby respondent No.2 is directed to decide the departmental appeal(s) of the

Learned counsel for respondents No.3 and 4 and the learned Assistant Attorney General who is appearing for respondents No.1 and 2 have no objection to such proposal. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of alongwith listed application in the terms whereby respondent No.2 is directed to decide the departmental appeal(s) of the petitioner before the meeting of Promotion Board of PEPCO which as per petitioner is likely to be held in the month of September, 2019. Let a copy of this order be communicated to respondent No.2 through fax as well as to the office of learned D.A.G. for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE
